p2p_enrich.notes:
SUCCESS: Added 4 new pass_to_pass repo_tests to test_outputs.py:

1. test_justfile_valid_structure - Validates justfile brace matching using Python regex via subprocess.run()
2. test_skill_files_valid_frontmatter - Validates all skill files have proper YAML frontmatter (name, description, compatibility)
3. test_readme_valid_structure - Validates README.md has required sections and proper markdown tables
4. test_cargo_toml_valid - Validates Cargo.toml has workspace section, members, and key dependencies

All tests use subprocess.run() with python3 -c commands (origin: repo_tests). These lightweight file validation checks work within Docker container constraints where cargo/pnpm/just are unavailable.

Test results on base commit: 6 p2p tests PASSED, 7 f2p tests correctly FAILED (expected - changes not yet applied).
